[[Rep/Legends|Rep]] '''Slarm<ref name=":0">''[[Secrets of Naboo]]''</ref>''' was a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]], one of the many who served on [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]]' [[Gungan High Council/Legends|Council]].<ref name=":1">{{Film|I}}</ref> Slarm was known as the best [[Bubble wort/Legends|bubble wort]] engineer in [[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]].<ref name=":0" /> In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]<ref name="The Essential Reader's Companion">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> such member was present at the Council during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Nabbo]]<ref name=":2">''[[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace: The Expanded Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> sitting to the right of Nass, in particular when they first met the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]].<ref name=":1" />

==Behind the scenes==
Slarm made its first appearance in the [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|novelization]] of {{Film|I}},<ref name=":3" /> released on [[April 21]], [[1999]],<ref name="Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition">''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]''</ref> where he was simply identified as one of the Gugan Council members.<ref name=":3">[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' novelization]]</ref> It was first identified as Slarm in the [[2001]] [[roleplaying game]] [[Secrets of Naboo|''Secrets of Naboo'']].<ref name=":0" /> The [[2012]] reference book ''[[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace: The Expanded Visual Dictionary]]'' confirmed him<ref name=":2" /> to be the the Gugan Representative sitting at the right of [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]]''.''<ref name=":1" />

In [[LEGO Star Wars: The Video Game|''LEGO Star Wars: The Video Game'']] and [[LEGO Star Wars: The Complete Saga|''LEGO Star Wars: The Complete Saga'']] only two Gugan Representatives are shown alongside Rugor Nass in the cutscenes based on {{Film|I}}.<ref name="LEGO Star Wars: The Video Game">''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Video Game]]''</ref><ref name="LEGO Star Wars: The Complete Saga">''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Complete Saga]]''</ref> This article assumes that the one on his right is meant to be Slarm.
